title: Remote Administration Service Exposed
description: A remote administration service was discovered exposed on the external attack surface.
impact: Exposed admin interfaces increase brute-force, credential stuffing, and direct exploitation risk.
likelihood: Medium to High depending on authentication controls and patch levels.
recommendations: Restrict remote admin services to trusted IP ranges/VPN paths.
Enforce MFA and strong credential policies.
Disable unnecessary remote admin services exposed to the internet.
